info.name: HospitalOS — Seed Local Data
info.description:
Seeds a local Supabase instance with realistic test data for the HospitalOS platform.

Run requests in order (or use Collection Runner). Each request saves returned IDs to collection variables so later requests can reference them as foreign keys.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "City General Hospital",
  "slug": "city-general",
  "address": "450 Medical Center Drive, Springfield, IL 62701",
  "phone": "+1-217-555-0100",
  "email": "info@citygeneral.dev",
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "name": "Riverside Medical Center",
  "slug": "riverside",
  "address": "1200 River Road, Springfield, IL 62702",
  "phone": "+1-217-555-0200",
  "email": "info@riverside.dev",
  "is_active": true
}

item.name: 2. Setup — Users
item.description: Each user requires two requests: one to create the auth user (with app_metadata for RLS), and one to create the user_profiles row.

  "notes": "24-year-old female presenting with intermittent palpitations over 2 weeks. ECG normal sinus rhythm. No structural abnormalities on echo. Likely anxiety-related. Recommended stress management and follow-up in 4 weeks.",
  "status": "DRAFT"
}

{
  "hospital_id": "{{hospital_city_general_id}}",

  "admission_id": "{{admission_3_id}}",
  "visit_date": "{{record4_visit_date}}",
  "chief_complaint": "Productive cough, fever 39.2C, shortness of breath",
  "notes": "Chest X-ray confirmed right lower lobe pneumonia. Completed 5-day IV ceftriaxone + azithromycin. Fever resolved day 3. O2 saturation stable at 97% on room air. Discharged with oral amoxicillin-clavulanate 875mg BID x 5 days. Follow-up in 2 weeks.",
  "status": "FINALIZED",
  "finalized_by": "{{user_doctor1_cg_id}}",
  "finalized_at": "{{record4_finalized_at}}"
}

{
  "hospital_id": "{{hospital_city_general_id}}",
  "patient_id": "{{patient_2_id}}",

  "visit_date": "{{record5_visit_date}}",
  "chief_complaint": "Routine hypertension follow-up",
  "notes": "BP 128/82 (improved from 145/95). Lisinopril 10mg continued. Patient reports good medication adherence. Low-sodium diet discussed. Next follow-up in 3 months.",
  "status": "FINALIZED",
  "finalized_by": "{{user_doctor1_cg_id}}",
  "finalized_at": "{{record5_finalized_at}}"
}
